title: erysimastrum brachycarpum
intro: Erysimastrum brachycarpum, also known as 'Iracema', is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of South America, particularly in Brazil, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and coumarins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain diseases. Erysimastrum brachycarpum can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
